text: AI is rapidly changing the modern workplace. Many routine tasks are now automated, allowing employees to focus on more complex and creative work. Productivity tools powered by AI can schedule meetings, analyse data, and even draft emails. However, the most effective use of AI involves human-AI collaboration, where technology handles repetitive work and humans provide oversight and decision-making. This shift is leading to job changes: some roles are disappearing, while new ones, like AI trainers and ethics officers, are emerging. To succeed, workers need to adapt by developing digital skills and learning to work alongside intelligent machines.
